name: Independent Bank
description_short: Independent Bank is a credit building provider based in Memphis, Tennessee. Rated 4.5/5 with 94 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Independent Bank is a credit building provider serving clients in Memphis, Tennessee. Carrying a 4.5/5.0 Google rating from 94 reviews, Independent Bank has an excellent reputation among consumers in the Memphis area looking to build or rebuild their credit history.

Operating as a atm, Independent Bank provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit building solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Credit building services like Independent Bank in Memphis help consumers who are starting fresh or recovering from credit setbacks. The most effective credit building programs report to all three major credit bureaus and provide tools to track progress over time. When comparing providers, look for transparent pricing, no hidden fees, and verified reporting to Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion.

Consumers in the Memphis, Tennessee area who are considering Independent Bank should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit building provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
